message:
refactor: remove deprecated capabilities field from AgentSpec

The capabilities field was a legacy mixed bag of tools + agents.
Now that tools and agents are explicit fields everywhere, capabilities
is redundant. Remove it from the AgentSpec interface and all
construction sites, assertions, and reconciliation logic.

The reconcileRootCapabilities method now operates on the combined
[...tools, ...agents] list and splits back when writing. The legacy
YAML loader still reads a `capabilities` key from raw YAML for
backward compat, populating tools/agents via the "/" heuristic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,7 +47,6 @@ export function parseAgentMarkdown(content: string, source: string): AgentSpec {
 		model: raw.model,
 		tools,
 		agents,
-		capabilities: [...tools, ...agents],
 		constraints: { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS, ...raw.constraints },
 		tags: raw.tags ?? [],
 		version: raw.version ?? 1,

@@ -128,7 +128,6 @@ export class GenomeMutationService {
 						description: mutation.description,
 						system_prompt: mutation.system_prompt,
 						model: mutation.model,
-						capabilities: [...mutation.tools, ...mutation.agents],
 						tools: mutation.tools,
 						agents: mutation.agents,
 						constraints: { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS, can_spawn: false },

-					capabilities: [...tools, ...agents],

 					constraints: { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS, can_spawn: false },
